title: Bright lights and hot orbs: UFO files shed light on sightings but leave interpretation to the public
description: The Pentagon has begun releasing files on UFOs, tapping into public curiosity about unidentified phenomena

title: Pentagon UFO files are out... but do they finally prove aliens exist?
description: The Pentagon has released hundreds of UFO-related files, including Apollo mission transcripts, military videos and eyewitness reports of unexplained aerial phenomena. While the disclosures have raised questions over extraterrestrial life, experts say the documents stop short of proving aliens exist or confirming recovered alien technology

title: Trump’s UFO Files Reveal ‘4-FOOT BEINGS’ In Space Suits? Bombshell FBI Memo Resurfaces
description: U.S. President Donald Trump’s long-awaited UFO disclosure has triggered a massive online frenzy after newly released FBI files revealed chilling claims of mysterious four-foot-tall beings wearing “space suits” near unidentified crafts. The bombshell 1966 memo sent to FBI Director J. Edgar Hoover detailed strange UFO sightings, metallic wreckage, and alleged crewmen encounters. As conspiracy theories explode online, even lawmakers are teasing bigger revelations ahead. Is this proof of extraterrestrial life... or just another government mystery getting deeper?

title: Why is Pentagon releasing UFO files now? #world
description: The disclosure follows a political push for openness The Pentagon’s release of declassified UAP materials comes after President Donald Trump directed that UFO related documents be made public. In the coverage provided, Defense officials frame the action as a step toward maximizing transparency and...

title: What did Pentagon UFO files reveal? #world
description: Pentagon releases declassified UFO file batch The U.S. Department of Defense released “never before seen” files and related video material about Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP), including reports spanning decades.
